Download for free

Enter the Coach Bowman Challenge

In the Month of April, we will be hosting the #CoachBowmanChallenge, a month-long giveaway where we will be awarding 2 winners every week with an exclusive prize pack.

Two New Winners in 0 Days

Apr 1 Apr 30
View Rules

What is the #CoachBowmanChallenge1?

Three Skill Challenge

Capture your best three skills within the Coach Bowman app. Think you have the most unique sequence? Show us what you got.

Prize Pack (Each Winner)

  • One Year of Coach Bowman subscription
  • Training tank
  • Tripod
  • $100 Amazon gift card

How Winners Are Picked

We pick the most creative, funny, or unique entries. It is not about the hardest skill or highest score.

How to Enter the #CoachBowmanChallenge1

Step 1: Agree to Giveaway Terms

Download Coach Bowman, capture your turn in the app, then clip your best skill into your favorite celebration.

Step 2: Download the Coach Bowman App

Use the Participate in Giveaway button while clipping. It adds the Coach Bowman logo overlay and takes you to agree to giveaway terms.

Step 3: Capture Your Clip in the Coach Bowman App

Post your clip as a Reel, tag @CoachBowman, and include #CoachBowmanChallenge1 to complete your entry.

Step 4: Post on Instagram

Post your clip as a Reel, tag @CoachBowman, and include #CoachBowmanChallenge1 to complete your entry.

Affiliate Hooks

Hook 1

Turn your best skill into a win. Film it. Clip it. Celebrate it. Win gear.

Hook 2 + Hook 3

Already training anyway? Post one clip and you could win. Best skill. Best celebration. Three winners.

Next Steps

Post your clip, tag @CoachBowman, and use #CoachBowmanChallenge1.
